{{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ancient_Kofun_in_Japan |name=Sakota Dōzan Kofun / Sakakoda Kofun |image=[[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location={{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type={{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built={{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of {{ill|Fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft}} or {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft}} has not been confirmed. Only fragments of {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft}} have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-{{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, around the {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|ja|造山古墳|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|ja|造山古墳|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - revision.comment: 10 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:佐古田堂山古墳 up to rev 101786611
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 佐古田堂山古墳 / 坂古田古墳 |画像 = [[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
墳丘全景（右に後円部、左に前方部） |所属 = |所在地 = [[岡山県]][[岡山市]][[北区 (岡山市)|北区]]平山 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 41|緯度秒 = 41.04 |経度度 =133|経度分 = 49|経度秒 = 51.78 |ISO = JP-33 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長150m
高さ12m（後円部） |築造時期 = [[5世紀]] |埋葬施設 = |被葬者 = |出土品 = |史跡 = 岡山県指定史跡「坂古田古墳」 |特記事項 = |地図=Japan Okayama |ラベル = 佐古田堂山
古墳 |アイコン=前方後円墳-北北西 |ラベル位置 = top }} '''佐古田堂山古墳'''（さこたどうざんこふん/さこだどうやまこふん{{Sfn|佐古田堂山古墳（平凡社）|1988}}）または'''坂古田古墳'''は、[[岡山県]][[岡山市]][[北区 (岡山市)|北区]]平山にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。岡山県指定史跡に指定されている（指定名称は「坂古田古墳」）。 == 概要 == 岡山市西部に位置する丘陵の先端部に築造された大型前方後円墳である{{Sfn|佐古田堂山古墳（平凡社）|1988}}。墳形は前方後円形で、前方部を北方に向ける。墳丘は2段築成。[[葺石]]・[[埴輪]]の存在は明らかでなく、墳丘表面では[[須恵器]]が採集されるのみであるが、この須恵器も古墳との関連は明らかでない。後円部の周囲にはかつて古墳6基が存在しており、それらについては[[1961年]]（[[昭和]]36年）に発掘調査が実施されている{{Sfn|佐古田堂山古墳（平凡社）|1988}}{{Sfn|佐古田堂山古墳（古墳）|1989}}。 この佐古田堂山古墳は、[[古墳時代]]中期の[[5世紀]]頃の築造と推定される。吉備地方の首長墓としては[[小盛山古墳]]（[[円墳]]としては全国第3位）に後続し、[[造山古墳]]（全国第4位の巨大古墳[https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/dkofun/ranking/zenkoku.html 古墳大きさランキング（日本全国版）]（堺市ホームページ、2018年5月13日更新版）。）に先行する首長墓と推測される。 古墳域は[[1959年]]（[[昭和]]34年）に岡山県指定史跡に指定されている。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り[http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html 佐古田堂山古墳]（岡山市シティミュージアム「[https://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/bunkazai_top/index.html 岡山市の文化財探訪]」）。。 * 墳丘長：150メートル * 後円部 - 2段築成。 ** 直径：88メートル ** 高さ：12メートル * 前方部 - 2段築成。 ** 長さ：70メートル == 文化財 == === 岡山県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 坂古田古墳 - 1959年（昭和34年）3月27日指定[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 坂古田古墳]（岡山県「おかやまの文化財」）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 参考文献 == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=佐古田堂山古墳|title=[[日本歴史地名大系]] 34 岡山県の地名|publisher=[[平凡社]]|isbn=4582490344|ref={{Harvid|佐古田堂山古墳（平凡社）|1988}}}} * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=出宮徳尚|year=1989|chapter=佐古田堂山古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harvid|佐古田堂山古墳（古墳）|1989}}}} == 関連項目 == * [[造山古墳]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 坂古田古墳] - 岡山県「おかやまの文化財」 * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html 佐古田堂山古墳] - 岡山市シティミュージアム「[https://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/bunkazai_top/index.html 岡山市の文化財探訪]」 {{DEFAULTSORT:さこたとうさんこふん}} [[Category:岡山県の古墳]] [[Category:岡山市北区の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]] [[Category:岡山県指定史跡]]

Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built={{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of {{ill|Fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft}} or {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft}} has not been confirmed. Only fragments of {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft}} have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-{{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, around the {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|ja|造山古墳|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|ja|造山古墳|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[en:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[sn:akotadōyama Kofun]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ancient_Kofun_in_Japan |name=Sakota Dōzan Kofun / Sakakoda Kofun |image=[[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location={{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type={{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built={{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/5th century|qq=}} |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|qq=}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of {{ill|Fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukiishi|qq=}} or {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haniwa|qq=}} has not been confirmed. Only fragments of {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-{{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}, around the {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/5th century|qq=}}. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|ja|造山古墳|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|qq=}}, the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|ja|造山古墳|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|qq=}} - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[en:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[sn:akotadōyama Kofun]]

View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location={{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture|qq=}}, {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type={{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|comement=second one attempting to fix this error|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built={{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/5th century|qq=}} |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|qq=}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|comement=second one attempting to fix this error|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama|qq=}}, Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of {{ill|Fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukiishi|qq=}} or {{ill|haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haniwa|qq=}} has not been confirmed. Only fragments of {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-{{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}, around the {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/5th century|qq=}}. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|ja|造山古墳|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|qq=}}, the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|ja|造山古墳|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|qq=}} - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ancient_Kofun_in_Japan |name=Sakota Dōzan Kofun / Sakakoda Kofun |image=[[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location=[[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type=[[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built=[[:en:5th century|5th century]] |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|qq=}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[en:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[sn:akotadōyama Kofun]] [[Category:岡山市北区の歴史]] [[Category:岡山県の古墳]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]]

View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location=[[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type=[[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built=[[:en:5th century|5th century]] |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|qq=}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[sn:akotadōyama Kofun]] [[Category:岡山市北区の歴史]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]]

The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ancient_Kofun_in_Japan |name=Sakota Dōzan Kofun / Sakakoda Kofun |image=[[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location=[[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type=[[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built=[[:en:5th century|5th century]] |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|qq=|1=Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472269}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Sakotadōyama Kofun]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[sn:akotadōyama Kofun]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built=[[:en:5th century|5th century]] |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|qq=|1=Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472269}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:qq]] {{wikidata link|Q28685084}}

It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q28685084}}

Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built=[[:en:5th century|5th century]] |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|1=Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472269}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q28685084}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|34.694733|N|133.83105|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|architectural_styles={{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|WD=Q11268718|1=Zenpokoenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28685084]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ancient_Kofun_in_Japan |name=Sakota Dōzan Kofun / Sakakoda Kofun |image=[[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location=[[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type=[[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built=[[:en:5th century|5th century]] |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|1=Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472269}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q28685084}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|34.694733|N|133.83105|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|architectural_styles={{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|WD=Q11268718|1=Zenpokoenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28685084]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ancient_Kofun_in_Japan |name=Sakota Dōzan Kofun / Sakakoda Kofun |image=[[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location=[[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type=[[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built=[[:en:5th century|5th century]] |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|1=Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472269}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] {{wikidata link|Q28685084}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|34.694733|N|133.83105|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|architectural_styles={{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|WD=Q11268718|1=Zenpokoenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28685084]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ancient_Kofun_in_Japan |name=Sakota Dōzan Kofun / Sakakoda Kofun |image=[[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location=[[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type=[[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built=[[:en:5th century|5th century]] |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|1=Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472269}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of [[:en:Fukiishi|Fukiishi]] or [[:en:Haniwa|haniwa]] has not been confirmed. Only fragments of [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-[[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], around the [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]], the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q28685084}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]

The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * [[:en:Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|Tsukuriyama Kofun]] - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q28685084}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]

revision.text:
[[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|34.694733|N|133.83105|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|architectural_styles={{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|WD=Q11268718|1=Zenpokoenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q28685084]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'Burial Facility' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Ancient_Kofun_in_Japan |name=Sakota Dōzan Kofun / Sakakoda Kofun |image=[[File:Sakota Douzan Kofun, zenkei.jpg|280px]]
View of the mound (rear circular section on the right, front rectangular section on the left) |alternate_name=Sakakoda Dōyama Kofun |location={{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|WD=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama}}, Kita Ward, Hirayama |coordinates={{Coord|34|41|41.04|N|133|49|51.78|E}} |type={{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} |map_size=Mound length: 150m
Height: 12m (rear circular section) |Burial Facility=Unknown |built={{ill|5th century|en|5th century|WD=Q8095|lt=5th century}} |Historic Site={{ill|Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|ja|岡山県指定文化財一覧#史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|1=Okayama Prefecture Designated Historic Sites|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472269}}, designated in 1959 }} '''Sakota Dōzan Kofun''' (佐古田堂山古墳) or '''Sakakoda Kofun''' (坂古田古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} located in Hirayama, Kita Ward, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama}}, Okayama Prefecture. The site is designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture under the name "Sakakoda Kofun." == Overview == The tumulus is a large keyhole-shaped Kofun built on the tip of a hill in the western part of Okayama City. The front rectangular section faces north. The mound is constructed in two tiers, but the presence of {{ill|Fukiishi|en|Fukiishi|WD=Q11621213|lt=Fukiishi}} or {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|WD=Q849376|lt=haniwa}} has not been confirmed. Only fragments of {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|WD=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery}} have been collected from the surface, but their connection to the tumulus is unclear. In the vicinity of the rear circular section, six smaller Kofuns were reported, and an excavation was conducted in 1961. This tumulus is thought to have been constructed during the mid-{{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}}, around the {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|WD=Q8095|lt=5th century}}. It follows the construction of {{ill|Komoriyama Kofun|ja|小盛山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komoriyama Kofun|qq=}} (one of the largest circular tumuli in Japan) and predates the construction of the {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|en|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|WD=Q11639745|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun}}, the fourth largest Kofun in Japan. The site was designated as a Historic Site of Okayama Prefecture in 1959. == Mound area == The dimensions of the mound are as follows: * Total length: 150 meters * Rear circular section (2 tiers): ** Diameter: 88 meters ** Height: 12 meters * Front rectangular section (2 tiers): ** Length: 70 meters == Cultural Properties == === Okayama Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site ** Sakakoda Kofun - Designated on March 27, 1959[http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] (Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama”).. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia]], Vol. 34: Okayama Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha|isbn=4582490344}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Tokunao Demiya|year=1989|chapter=Sakota Dōzan Kofun|title=[[Encyclopedia of Infobox ancient site]]|publisher=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|isbn=4490102607}} == Related Sites == * {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|en|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|WD=Q11639745|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun}} - A nearby colossal tumulus. == External Links == * [http://www.pref.okayama.jp/cgi-bin/bunka/culture/controller/client/resultDetail.cgi?id=326 Sakakoda Kofun] - Okayama Prefecture “Cultural Properties of Okayama” * [http://www.city.okayama.jp/museum/kofun2/02.html Sakota Dōzan Kofun] - Okayama City Museum “Exploring Okayama's Cultural Properties” {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|佐古田堂山古墳|version=101786611|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:佐古田堂山古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q28685084}} [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Okayama Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:History of Okayama]] [[Category:Kofun of Okayama prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]
